text_block_list.text:
One weekend, I'm heading to the shopping
district with Mihono Bourbon, when...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The Sweet Stamp Rally is about to begin! ☆ Now
recruiting participants!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Sweet... Stamp Rally?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hey, you two! Wanna join the event?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You collect one stamp for each dessert you eat
from the different stores in the shopping district!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
If you collect all fifty stamps, you get to eat an
exclusive, completely custom-made confection!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Completely... custom... made...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
So... you are saying it would be possible to craft a
flawless treat that uses adrenaline-boosting fruits
and nutrients for increasing muscle mass?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Well, yeah, it's completely custom-made, after
all! No problem! The manager should be able to
whip up something like that!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. The total caloric content of fifty varieties
of desserts is massive.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: However, the reward is alluring... Extremely alluring. Please, give me instructions.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's too bad! Well, you do have some races
coming up, so it's probably best to watch what
you eat.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood, Trainer. However, please allow me
to clarify one point.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
To me, your orders are infallible. Therefore,
apologies are unnecessary. In fact...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your consideration.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: U-uhhh... I feel like I'm the third wheel here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You two really get along well. Heck, the
pair of you might be even sweeter than all these
desserts put together!

We don't end up participating in the event... but
hearing Mihono Bourbon's kind words warms my
heart.

And so, we end up participating in the stamp
rally...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... gulp. Consumption of item fifty, the Deluxe Special Sundae, is complete.

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for participating! Now, what would you
like for your custom-made confection?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, you wanted a "flawless" dessert, right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. One that includes fruits that provide relief
from fatigue and nutrients for increasing muscle
mass.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I require it to include the following
ingredients—apple, natto, oyster, miso,
fermented fish, and protein powder.

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hahaha, got it! This will put my thirty years
as a pastry chef to the test!

Some days later, a jet-black cake that seems to
include all the ingredients Mihono Bourbon
requested arrives, and she polishes it off with
satisfaction.
